predictions.prediction: If false-green completion and weak self-repair remain, BuilderOS will keep appearing closer to done than it is.
predictions.recommended_action: Close machine truth before further expansion.

predictions.prediction: If closure succeeds, the founder UI can become a credible front door for governed build requests and continuous self-improvement.
predictions.recommended_action: Require same-tier determinism and UI proof before scaling trust.

predictions.prediction: The winning systems will be the ones with the strongest intake shaping, receipts, and self-repair loops, not the loudest autonomy claims.
predictions.recommended_action: Keep architecture grounded in proof, not theater.
